name: io.github.Massed-Compute/mcp
description: Massed Compute MCP — browse GPU inventory, launch and manage VMs, audit billing.

environmentVariables.name: MASSED_COMPUTE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Massed Compute API key (Bearer token). Generate at https://vm.massedcompute.com/settings/api. Optional — `massed-compute-mcp init` provides an interactive first-run flow that prompts for the key, validates it, and stores it locally with 0600 permissions.

environmentVariables.name: MASSED_COMPUTE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Massed Compute API key (Bearer token). Generate at https://vm.massedcompute.com/settings/api. Optional — `massed-compute-mcp init` provides an interactive first-run flow that prompts for the key, validates it, and stores it locally with 0600 permissions.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Your Massed Compute API key as a Bearer token (include the 'Bearer ' prefix). Generate one at https://vm.massedcompute.com/settings/api — use a read-only key for analysis-only assistants so destructive tools (launch, restart, terminate, SSH-key deletion) are hidden entirely.
